case_title: REDWOOD REALTY AND MORTGAGE INC. VS CHEN, ANTHONY

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, ANTHONY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REDWOOD REALTY AND MORTGAGE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEN, ANTHONY $2,675.50 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,727.50, DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR. THE COURT DOES NOT FIND SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE OF GOOD CAUSE TO SUPPORT DEFT'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE DUE TO ILLNESS ON THE DATE OF THE HEARING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
